name: Pineapple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a tightly covered container, combine olive oil, lemon juice, soy sauce, and brown sugar.
2. Toss the pineapple chunks (or canned pineapple), diced apple, and sliced green onions with the dressing.
3. Place the shredded romaine lettuce in a shallow bowl.
4. Mound the fruit mixture in the center of the lettuce.
